title: O LORD, in Wrath Rebuke Me Not

verses.text: My soul with anguish is distressed. O LORD, how long will you delay? LORD, turn to me, and free my soul; in lovingkindness, save, I pray.
For none in death remembers you; and who will praise you from the grave? My sighs and moaning weary me; each night my bed with tears I bathe.
My eyes grow weak with tears of grief; they fail because of all my foes. Depart from me, all evil men! The Lord has heard my tearful woes.
The LORD accepts my prayer for help; the LORD has heard my cry and plea. My enemies, disgraced and shamed, will suddenly turn back from me.
